meta.title: Meaningful Tax Reform: Is a "Main Street"-Focused Alternative the Best Path Forward?
meta.description: Jeffrey H. Anderson, Kyle Pomerleau, Alan Viard, Eric Toder, and Henry Olsen discuss The Main Street Tax Plan and the best strategy for tax reform.
